name: Pac Golf 365
about: Pac Golf 365 provides an indoor golf experience centered around simulator technology. The venue utilizes modern tracking systems to allow players to experience virtual courses or practice their swings in a controlled environment. The facility offers digital payment solutions and online booking, suggesting a focus on convenience and accessibility for golfers looking to play or practice regardless of weather conditions. The venue caters to a general audience seeking indoor golf entertainment.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You do not necessarily need to bring your own clubs, as rental equipment is typically available at indoor golf venues. It is recommended to contact Pac Golf 365 directly to confirm club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Policies regarding outside food and drinks vary by venue. Please check with Pac Golf 365 regarding their specific rules on outside refreshments.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On a golf simulator, playing 18 holes typically takes between 45 minutes to an hour depending on the pace of play and the specific software settings.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, most golf simulator venues are family-friendly and offer a controlled environment that is suitable for juniors and beginners.
